# LGA Council Portal — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-lga-office-lga-council-portal
**Vertical slug:** lga-office
**VN-ID:** VN-POL-LGA-001
**Niche family:** NF-POL-LGA standalone
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's 774 Local Government Councils (LGAs) are the third tier of government responsible for primary healthcare, primary education, market fees, waste collection, birth/death registration, and minor road maintenance. ALGON (Association of Local Governments of Nigeria) is the umbrella body. Most LGAs have near-zero digital presence despite legal mandates for transparency under the FOIA (Freedom of Information Act 2011) and the Open Government Partnership Nigeria. LGA council chairmen, council secretaries, and departmental directors are the primary stakeholders who would use this template. Residents and journalists are the primary audience. Digitising council information (minutes, budget, tax schedules, tender notices) is an accountability demand from civil society.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Resident, 40, Ikeja LGA, Lagos** — Looking for refuse collection schedule, market stall levy payment, and birth registration office hours.
- **Contractor, 48, Abuja Municipal Area Council** — Checking tender notices, prequalification documents, and award announcements.
- **Journalist, 29, Premium Times** — Reviewing council budget, FOI requests, and councillor attendance records.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home:** Council chairman welcome, LGA seal, key services directory, news ticker, citizen WhatsApp contact
- **Council Administration:** Chairman bio, Councillors list, departments, organogram
- **Services:** Birth/Death Registration, Market Levy, Refuse Collection, Health Centres, Primary Schools
- **Tenders & Contracts:** Current tenders, awarded contracts, prequalification notices
- **Budget & Transparency:** Annual budget (NGN), council minutes, FOI request procedure
- **News & Notices:** Official circulars, public health alerts, market closures
- **Contact:** Council secretariat, department heads, WhatsApp, NDPR notice

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Official, transparent, citizen-first. "Serving {LGA Name} with accountability." register. Reference ALGON, FOIA, and UBEC compliance. Primary CTA: "Access Council Services". Secondary CTA: "Submit an FOI Request". WhatsApp: "Contact the Council Secretariat".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- ALGON membership affiliation
- State government oversight ministry reference
- FIRS council tax compliance display
- FOIA compliance statement
- Code of Conduct Bureau filing reference for elected officials
- Open Government Partnership Nigeria participation (where applicable)

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Council chambers — councillors in session, LGA flag and coat of arms
2. Chairman receiving residents — community liaison meeting, council premises
3. Market levy payment booth — orderly queue, uniformed revenue officers
4. Primary school under LGA administration — children in uniform, LGA-funded building
5. Refuse collection trucks — LGA branded vehicles, early morning Lagos/Abuja setting
6. Birth registration office — families with newborns, officiated by civil servant
7. Public notice board — tender notices and council circulars displayed at council gate

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- FOIA compliance statement displayed (public information access)
- Code of Conduct Bureau reference for elected officials
- FIRS council tax collection mandate reference
- NDPR consent for resident data (birth registration, service applications)
- Anti-corruption/transparency policy statement (ICPC compliance)

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp CTA for citizen contact and secretariat
- [x] All levies/fees in NGN (₦)
- [x] Nigerian LGA context (ALGON, FOIA, specific LGA names)
- [x] Nigerian names in council directory examples
- [x] ALGON and FOIA trust signals displayed
- [x] Payment: bank transfer, Remita for government payments
- [x] Mobile-first 375px layout
- [x] esc() on all user-supplied strings
- [x] NDPR notice for resident service forms
